theses.title: Fed pivot delayed — TLT weakness
theses.thesis: Duration stays under pressure until the Fed cutting cycle is repriced later than futures imply. Sticky core CPI and term-premium rebuild keep long bonds heavy.
drivers: Fed cutting cycle delayed vs. OIS
Term premium rebuild in long end

theses.title: EU tech fines keep META under pressure

drivers: EU DMA enforcement and recurring fines
